text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 19 

MDCD_ELGBLTY_GRP_CD_LTST 

LABEL: Medicaid — Eligibility Group Code — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: The eligibility group applicable to the Medicaid beneficiary based on the eligibility determination 
process for the calendar year; most recent in the calendar year. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: T-MSIS DE file 

VALUES: 01 = Parents and Other Caretaker Relatives 
02 = Transitional Medical Assistance 
03 = Extended
